mission.title: Identity Discovery Mission
mission.brief: Embark on a journey of self-discovery. Through 6 sub-missions and 30 checkpoints, you'll explore who you are at your core - your values, strengths, passions, and what makes you uniquely you.
objectives: Identify your core values and principles
Discover your natural strengths and talents
Understand what drives and motivates you
Recognize patterns in your life choices
Articulate your authentic self
mission.deliverable: By completing this mission, you'll create a comprehensive Identity Statement that captures who you are beyond roles and titles.

1.title: Core Values Exploration
1.description: Discover the principles that guide your decisions and define what matters most to you.

2.title: Strengths & Talents Assessment
2.description: Identify your natural abilities and what you do better than most people.

3.title: Passion & Energy Mapping
3.description: Find what activities energize you and make you lose track of time.

4.title: Life Patterns Recognition
4.description: See the recurring themes and choices that reveal your true nature.

5.title: Authentic Self Expression
5.description: Learn to articulate who you are in your own words.

6.title: Identity Statement Creation
6.description: Synthesize your discoveries into a powerful identity statement.

mission.title: Problem Discovery Mission
mission.brief: Explore meaningful problems that resonate with your identity. Through 6 sub-missions and 30 checkpoints, you'll identify problems that call you to action and connect to who you are.
objectives: Identify problems you care deeply about
Understand why certain problems move you
Evaluate problem significance and scope
Connect problems to your identity
Select your life problem candidate
mission.deliverable: By completing this mission, you'll create a Problem Candidate List with 5-20 problems that deeply resonate with who you are.

1.title: Problem Awareness Building
1.description: Open your eyes to problems around you that others might ignore.

2.title: Personal Connection Exploration
2.description: Understand why certain problems affect you more than others.

3.title: Problem Significance Analysis
3.description: Evaluate the scale, scope, and impact of different problems.

4.title: Identity-Problem Alignment
4.description: Connect your identity to problems you're uniquely positioned to address.

5.title: Problem Portfolio Development
5.description: Build a comprehensive list of meaningful problem candidates.

6.title: Primary Problem Selection
6.description: Choose the problem that resonates most deeply with you.

mission.title: Problem Owner Discovery Mission
mission.brief: Build deep empathy by understanding the people experiencing your problem. Through 6 sub-missions and 30 checkpoints, you'll learn their stories, struggles, and dreams.
objectives: Identify who is most affected by your problem
Understand their daily reality and challenges
Learn what they've tried and why it didn't work
Feel their emotions and frustrations
Tell their story with empathy and detail
mission.deliverable: By completing this mission, you'll create a compelling Problem Owner Story that shows the human impact of your chosen problem.

1.title: Problem Owner Identification
1.description: Find and define who experiences your problem most acutely.

2.title: Daily Life Documentation
2.description: Map out what a typical day looks like for problem owners.

3.title: Barrier & Challenge Analysis
3.description: Understand the obstacles they face and attempted solutions.

4.title: Emotional Impact Exploration
4.description: Feel the emotional weight of how the problem affects them.

5.title: Dreams & Aspirations Mapping
5.description: Learn what they hope for that the problem prevents.

6.title: Story Weaving & Narrative
6.description: Craft a compelling narrative that brings their experience to life.

mission.title: Purpose Definition Mission
mission.brief: Synthesize your identity and problem into a clear purpose statement. Through 6 sub-missions and 30 checkpoints, you'll define your unique contribution to solving your chosen problem.
objectives: Connect your identity to your problem
Define your unique approach or perspective
Clarify the impact you want to have
Articulate your long-term vision
Create your life purpose statement
mission.deliverable: By completing this mission, you'll create a Life Purpose Statement that defines your reason for being and the legacy you want to leave.

1.title: Identity-Problem Synthesis
1.description: Connect who you are to the problem you're called to solve.

2.title: Unique Positioning Discovery
2.description: Understand what makes your approach uniquely yours.

3.title: Impact Vision Crafting
3.description: Define the specific change you want to create in the world.

4.title: Long-term Legacy Planning
4.description: Envision what you want to be remembered for.

5.title: Purpose Articulation Practice
5.description: Learn to express your purpose clearly and compellingly.

6.title: Purpose Statement Finalization
6.description: Create your definitive life purpose statement.

mission.title: Project Creation Mission
mission.brief: Design a concrete project that embodies your purpose. Through 6 sub-missions and 30 checkpoints, you'll create an actionable plan to make your purpose real.
objectives: Brainstorm potential project ideas
Evaluate feasibility and impact
Define your target users/beneficiaries
Create a concrete action plan
Design your project's first version
mission.deliverable: By completing this mission, you'll create a Purpose-driven Project Plan that you can actually build and launch within 6-12 months.

1.title: Solution Ideation & Brainstorming
1.description: Generate multiple project ideas that address your problem.

2.title: Feasibility & Impact Assessment
2.description: Evaluate which project ideas are most viable and impactful.

3.title: Target Audience Definition
3.description: Identify who will benefit from and use your project.

4.title: Resource & Capability Mapping
4.description: Assess what resources you have and what you need to acquire.

5.title: Project Roadmap Creation
5.description: Build a timeline and action plan for your project.

6.title: Version 1.0 Design
6.description: Define what your minimum viable project looks like.
